generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope indicated by the validator error.
Implementation-level contracts belong in implementation annexes.
Type-level contracts belong in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assign` only for existing output features.
Ensure all identifiers are visible in the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level contracts.
